title: helianthemum nummularium subsp. semiglabrum
intro: Helianthemum nummularium subsp. semiglabrum, also known as Rock Rose or Petrichor, is a sub-species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Rock Rose include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rock Rose is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in skincare products due to its anti-aging and protective properties.
